cards.back: A type of experimental design where each treatment is assigned randomly to each experimental unit
A technique used in CRD to reduce the effect of extraneous variation by dividing experimental units into homogeneous groups
The process of repeating the experimental treatment or condition to increase the reliability and accuracy of the results
A statistical measure used to describe the number of independent pieces of information in a dataset, used in ANOVA calculations
A term used in ANOVA to describe the variation in the data that can be attributed to different factors, such as treatment or error
